title: Senior Plant Manager at Wavin India

jsonLd.title: Senior Plant Manager at Wavin India
jsonLd.description:
Are you a skilled Plant Manager looking for your next big career move? Wavin India in Bhubaneswar offers you the perfect platform to grow professionally and personally.

About Wavin India:
Wavin India is a leading organization in the Hybrid sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Oversee daily production operations to meet output targets
• Coordinate with design and engineering teams on product improvements
• Ensure product quality meets internal and customer specifications
• Ensure compliance with safety regulations and factory acts
• Coordinate with logistics for dispatching finished goods
• Manage raw material procurement and inventory levels
• Train and supervise shop floor workers and supervisors

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• Chartered Accountant (ICAI)
• 0-1 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in ISO 9001
• Proficiency in APQP
• Proficiency in Lean Manufacturing
• Proficiency in AutoCAD
• Proficiency in FMEA
• Proficiency in Kaizen
• Proficiency in Quality Control
• Proficiency in Supply Chain Management

Work Mode: Hybrid - Flexible work-from-home and office

What We Offer:
• Mobile and internet reimbursement
• International travel opportunities for senior roles
• Competitive salary with performance-linked incentives
• Annual performance appraisal
• Referral bonus program
• Comprehensive health insurance for self and family
• Salary Range: 2.5 LPA - 6 LPA per annum

Location: Bhubaneswar, Odisha, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with Wavin India!
